mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET avatar = #{avatarUrl}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_notification_setting ( user_id, review_complete, risk_alert, system_notice, email_notification, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{notificationSettings.reviewComplete}, #{notificationSettings.riskAlert}, #{notificationSettings.systemNotice}, #{notificationSettings.emailNotification}, NOW(), NOW() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE review_complete = #{notificationSettings.reviewComplete}, risk_alert = #{notificationSettings.riskAlert}, system_notice = #{notificationSettings.systemNotice}, email_notification = #{notificationSettings.emailNotification}, updated_at = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT review_complete AS reviewComplete, risk_alert AS riskAlert, system_notice AS systemNotice, email_notification AS emailNotification FROM user_notification_setting WHERE user_id = #{userId}
